skills.name: Gather Corpse
skills.description: Releases evil energy into your opponent. The corpse parts of monsters affected by the evil energy can be collected once defeated. Gather Corpse inflicts Necromancer Bane which increases the damage dealt by your summons.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor %
Gather Corpse Duration: CaptionRatio2 seconds
Necromancer Bane Duration: CaptionTime seconds
Increases damage by Summons while under Necromancer Bane by CaptionRatio %
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

skills.name: Create Shoggoth
skills.description: Create a Shoggoth with a Beast, Plant, or Mutant-type card inserted in Necronomicon.
skills.effect_text:
Attack Transfer Rate: CaptionRatio %
Physical/Magic Defense Transfer Rate: CaptionRatio2 %
Adds Maximum HP Transfer Rate by CaptionRatio3 %
Consumes 30 corpse parts
Duration: 30 minutes

skills.name: Flesh Cannon
skills.description: Throw corpse parts on a targeted area to attack nearby enemies.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 16
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR
Consumes Corpse Part x CaptionRatio

skills.name: Flesh Hoop
skills.description: Encircle yourself with corpse parts that damage nearby enemies. Chance to deal additional damage to decaying enemies. Increases Flesh Cannon damage by 100% while Flesh Hoop is active and lifts the buff on Flesh Cannon use.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 16
Duration: 16 seconds
Consumes Corpse Part x CaptionRatio

skills.name: Disinter
skills.description: Victimize a summoned Skeleton for different buffs for the rest.

skills.name: Corpse Tower
skills.description: Build a cursed tower made of corpse parts, which delivers [Poison] property attacks in the targeted area.
skills.effect_text:
Attack Transfer Rate: CaptionRatio3 %
Number of Defense: CaptionTime
Consumes 7 corpse parts
Duration: 100 seconds

skills.name: Raise Dead
skills.description: Summon a Skeleton Soldier made from corpse parts.
skills.effect_text:
Summon 1 Skeleton Soldier
Consumes 5 corpse parts
Attack Transfer Rate: CaptionRatio %
Physical/Magic Defense Transfer Rate: CaptionRatio2 %
Maximum HP Transfer Rate: CaptionRatio3 %
Duration: 30 minutes

skills.name: Raise Skull Archer
skills.description: Summon a Skeleton Archer made from corpse parts.
skills.effect_text:
Summon 1 Skeleton Archer
Consumes 5 corpse parts
Attack Transfer Rate: CaptionRatio %
Physical/Magic Defense Transfer Rate: CaptionRatio2 %
Maximum HP Transfer Rate: CaptionRatio3 %
Duration: 30 minutes

skills.name: Raise Skull Mage
skills.description: Summon a Skeleton Mage made from corpse parts.
skills.effect_text:
Summon 1 Skeleton Mage
Consumes 5 corpse parts
Attack Transfer Rate: CaptionRatio %
Physical/Magic Defense Transfer Rate: CaptionRatio2 %
Maximum HP Transfer Rate: CaptionRatio3 %
Duration: 15 minutes

skills.name: Summon: Force Attack
skills.description: Your summon will attack the targeted enemy.

skills.name: Summon: Cancel Attack
skills.description: Cancels Force Attack and attacks enemies randomly.

attributes.name: Gather Corpse: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Gather Corpse] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Flesh Cannon: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Flesh Cannon] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Flesh Hoop: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Flesh Hoop] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Flesh: Demoralize
attributes.description:
* Weakens the attack of enemies affected by Flesh Hoop and Flesh Cannon for 4 second duration

* [Attack Weakened] debuff reduces the attack of affected enemies by 2% per attribute level

* Increases SP consumption by 20%

attributes.name: Create Shoggoth: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of your summoned Shoggoth's skills by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Corpse Tower: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the attack transfer rate of the summoned Corpse Tower by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added damage at maximum level

attributes.name: Raise Dead: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of your summoned Skeleton Soldiers' skills by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Create Shoggoth: Enlargement
attributes.description:
* 2.5% chance of enlarging the size and increasing the summoned Shoggoth's maximum HP by 2% per attribute level

* Increases SP consumption by 20%

attributes.name: Raise Skull Archer: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of your summoned Skeleton Archers' skills by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Necromancer: Corpse Fragment Capacity
attributes.description: * Increases Necronomicon's maximum corpse fragment capacity by 100 per attribute level

attributes.name: Raise Dead: Collect Corpse Fragments
attributes.description:
* When a Skull Soldier defeats a monster, the Necronomicon gains 1 corpse fragment per attribute level

* Increases SP consumption by 10%

attributes.name: Raise Skull Mage: Protection Magic
attributes.description:
* Grants a 1-time knockback/knockdown immunity to all summons when Skull Mage is summoned

* Buff duration: 45 seconds

* Increases SP consumption by 20%

attributes.name: [Arts] Flesh Hoop: Dance of Death
attributes.description: * Skill factor x1.5 when using Flesh Hoop

attributes.name: [Arts] Raise Skull Mage: Supporter
attributes.description:
* Only one Skeleton Mage may be summoned and it lasts 30 minutes

* The Skeleton Mage provides a buff that has the following effects

- Increases the Physical and Magic Defense of Skeleton Soldiers by 100%

- Skeleton Archers use their basic attacks without waiting

attributes.name: [Arts] Gather Corpse: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Gather Corpse] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Create Shoggoth: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Create Shoggoth] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Flesh Cannon] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Flesh Hoop: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Flesh Hoop] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Corpse Tower: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Attack Trasfer Rate of [Corpse Tower] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Raise Dead] by 1.25% per attribute level
